question: Based on this scatterplot of age and revenue, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: The chart clearly shows that individuals between ages 45 and 55 earn the most revenue.
options.B: It is difficult to determine from the chart which age group has the highest revenue.
options.C: Individuals under age 30 clearly earn the least revenue in the chart.
options.D: All age groups in the chart have exactly the same revenue.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 40 and 50 have the highest revenue. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of revenue in certain age ranges.
